title: Big Oil’s Green Retreat Marks First Investment Decline Since 2017
summary: The world’s top oil and gas companies slashed investments in green energy in 2025 from a year earlier, for the first decline in their spending on low-carbon energy solutions since 2017, a new report by BloombergNEF showed on Wednesday.
